name: emergency_services_water_allocation_model_lumen_lib_eq
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Emergency Services, the situation tagged internally around emergency services water allocation model lumen lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. Framing has already hardened externally as liberty against equality; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Talia Serrano
agents.identity: I am Talia Serrano, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Emergency Services. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Sana Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Sana Kowalski, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Emergency Services. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if liberty advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for equality.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Talia Serrano must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Talia Serrano do?
